title: milium intermedium
intro: Milium intermedium, also known as False Flax or Intermediate Milium, is a perennial herb that belongs to the family Poaceae and is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Milium intermedium include reducing inflammation, soothing sore throats, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparation of this plant is typically done through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
